item.title: Kokuyo Design Award 2027: Dialogue
item.dc:creator: Contest Watchers
item.description: The Kokuyo Design Award 2027, themed “dialogue.” has been announced! This time the Award focuses on the reciprocal relationships that lie behind excellent design, specifically between “the people who create objects, and the users,” “the users and the objects,” and “the objects and their surrounding environment”. Kokuyo are seeking designs that explore unknown ideas and insights within this new “space” and expand the possibilities of living, learning, and working. The best design will be awarded with ¥2,000,000 — about $13,000. Three Merit awards of ¥500,000 each, will also be selected, along with up to 10 winners for the New Generation Award — awarded with ¥30,000 each.
item.content:encoded:
The Kokuyo Design Award 2027, themed “dialogue.” has been announced! This time the Award focuses on the reciprocal relationships that lie behind excellent design, specifically between “the people who create objects, and the users,” “the users and the objects,” and “the objects and their surrounding environment”. Kokuyo are seeking designs that explore unknown ideas and insights within this new “space” and expand the possibilities of living, learning, and working. The best design will be awarded with ¥2,000,000 — about $13,000. Three Merit awards of ¥500,000 each, will also be selected, along with up to 10 winners for the New Generation Award — awarded with ¥30,000 each.

Entries Open
24 July 2026 [ in 2+ weeks ]
Deadline
7 October 2026 [ 3+ months remaining ]
Results Announcement Expected
March 2027
Competition Cost
Free to Enter

Read more about Kokuyo Design Award 2027: Dialogue on Contest Watchers.

item.title: PHOTO IS:RAEL 2026 International Photography Festival
item.dc:creator: Contest Watchers
item.description: PHOTO IS:RAEL is pleased to invite artists to submit proposals for the Main Exhibition of the 13th International Photography Festival, taking place in Tel Aviv in October 2026. The theme of this year’s festival is Citizens. Selected works will be exhibited in the Festival’s Main Exhibition and featured in the 2026 Festival catalog and website.

media:content.media:title: Photo by Wai Hang Siu - participant in the 2023 open call exhibition
media:content.media:credit: Photo by Wai Hang Siu - participant in the 2023 open call exhibition

item.content:encoded:
PHOTO IS:RAEL is pleased to invite artists to submit proposals for the Main Exhibition of the 13th International Photography Festival, taking place in Tel Aviv in October 2026. The theme of this year’s festival is Citizens. Selected works will be exhibited in the Festival’s Main Exhibition and featured in the 2026 Festival catalog and website.

Deadline
28 July 2026 [ 2+ weeks remaining ]
Results Announcement Expected
18 August 2026
Suggested by
Svetlana Reingold

Read more about PHOTO IS:RAEL 2026 International Photography Festival on Contest Watchers.

item.title: Hiiibrand Awards 2026 – Brand & Communication Design
item.dc:creator: Contest Watchers
item.description: Hiiibrand is calling for entries to the 17th Hiiibrand International Brand & Communication Design Awards. The Hiiibrand International Brand & Communication Design Awards is an international design award focused on brand shaping and design value. With 17 years of history, these Awards stand as a premier international platform renowned for its professionalism and forward-thinking vision.
item.content:encoded:
Hiiibrand is calling for entries to the 17th Hiiibrand International Brand & Communication Design Awards. The Hiiibrand International Brand & Communication Design Awards is an international design award focused on brand shaping and design value. With 17 years of history, these Awards stand as a premier international platform renowned for its professionalism and forward-thinking vision.

Deadline
31 August 2026 [ 2+ months remaining ]
Results Announcement Expected
March 2027

Read more about Hiiibrand Awards 2026 – Brand & Communication Design on Contest Watchers.
